formulas.description: Raw count of a term in a document.
Number of documents containing the term at least once.
Raw term frequency multiplied by scikit-learn smooth idf with no vector normalization.
Okapi BM25 using k1=1.5 and b=0.75 over explicit token counts.

comparators.name: scikit-learn
notes: Registry query on 2026-04-23 reported 1.8.0 as latest.

notes: Registry query on 2026-04-23 reported 8.1.1 as latest. Natural default idf differs from the canonical expected formula.
